meaning: adj.&n.<美俚>到处惹是生非的(坏蛋)
examples: They want to be somebody, want to be able to go home a big, badass Marine.
Recent Emmy-winner Joey Pants is one bust-out, badass dude who deserves a hit.
I had to admit that this was a pretty badass idea.
Nate Silver is a badass, as much as any statistician can really be a badass.
"I think when people start to play with the drones, they feel pretty badass, " Lamia said.
